# omada_static_route (Resource)

Manages a gateway static route on the Omada controller.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Route a remote subnet via a next-hop gateway on the LAN.
resource "omada_static_route" "lab" {
  name         = "to-lab"
  destinations = ["192.168.50.0/24"]
  next_hop_ip  = "10.10.20.1"
  metric       = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destinations` (List of String) Destination subnets in CIDR, e.g. `["192.168.50.0/24"]`.
- `name` (String) Route name.
- `next_hop_ip` (String) Next-hop gateway IP.

### Optional

- `enable` (Boolean) Whether the route is active.
- `metric` (Number) Route metric.
- `route_type` (Number) Route type (0 = next-hop).
- `site` (String) Site name. Defaults to the primary site. Changing forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `site_id` (String)
